structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-02-24 Tucson CIC MCC Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-02-24 10:23:40-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

 

Please be advised of the following update from the CIC of Tucson:

 

Due to high demand and funding limitations, we are temporarily not accepting applications for the Mortgage Credit Certificate (MCC) Program, effective immediately. We anticipate reopening for applications on April 15th when we receive our new allocation.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding. In the meantime, we encourage you to keep an eye out for Lighthouse 7.0, <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/cictucson.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2afc6740d4c9292ad69ff09cc&id=f3e8363632&e=bfb01094d4__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!XvH8Kwu-klEwILhxANwN1XhduI7rFxFKEL5cLAw7WNa74XU86ajkXblUqRT5GmMjRRHZjPoLh8qA0ha8HDnG$>  which will be launching soon! Stay tuned for more details.

Please note that borrowers who close before April 15th will not be able to apply for the MCC Program. We appreciate your patience and look forward to reaching out in the coming weeks with more information.

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
